items.teach_script: 'I want' in Spanish is one word: 'quiero'. Quiero. The 'I' is already inside it.

teach_segments.text: 'I want' in Spanish is one word:

items.teach_script: 'To eat' is 'comer'. Comer.
'To drink' is 'beber'. Beber.
'Now' is 'ahora'. Ahora. Time words like this usually go at the end.

teach_segments.text: Time words like this usually go at the end.

prompts.cue_en: How would you say: I want?
How would you say: I want to eat?
And: I want to drink?
Just the word: to eat.
Just the word: to drink.
Just: now.
I want to eat now.
prompts.decompose_script: Quiero — comer — ahora; the time word goes at the end.

prompts.cue_en: I want to drink now.
prompts.decompose_script: Quiero — beber — ahora.

prompts.cue_en: Again — I want to eat.
Build it: I want to drink now.
prompts.decompose_script: Piece by piece: quiero — beber — ahora.

prompts.cue_en: And: I want to eat now.
prompts.decompose_script: Quiero — comer — ahora.

prompts.cue_en: Last one for today: I want to drink.
prompts.decompose_script: Quiero — beber.

items.teach_script: 'You want' is 'quieres'. Quieres. Same word, different ending — the ending is the 'you'.

teach_segments.text: Same word, different ending — the ending is the 'you'.

items.teach_script: 'Not' is 'no'. No. Put it right before the verb: no quiero — I don't want.

teach_segments.text: Put it right before the verb:

items.teach_script: Spanish questions are free: say the sentence and let your voice rise at the end. ¿Quieres comer? — do you want to eat? Nothing else changes.

teach_segments.text: Spanish questions are free: say the sentence and let your voice rise at the end.
— do you want to eat? Nothing else changes.

items.teach_script: Spanish doesn't need the words for 'I' or 'you' — quiero already means I want, quieres already means you want. Add yo or tú only for emphasis.

teach_segments.text: Spanish doesn't need the words for 'I' or 'you' —

prompts.cue_en: A statement: you want to eat.
Now make it a question — do you want to eat?
How would you say: I don't want?
I don't want to eat.
prompts.decompose_script: No sits right before quiero: no quiero — comer.

prompts.cue_en: I don't want to drink now.
prompts.decompose_script: No quiero — beber — ahora.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: do you want to drink?
Tell me: you don't want to eat.
prompts.decompose_script: No quieres — comer.

prompts.cue_en: One Spanish word carries all of 'I want' — say just that word.
Ask me: don't you want to eat?
prompts.decompose_script: The statement with rising voice: ¿no quieres comer?

prompts.cue_en: Just: you want.
Quick: not.
You don't want to drink now.
prompts.decompose_script: No quieres — beber — ahora.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: do you want to eat now?
prompts.decompose_script: Quieres comer ahora — and let it rise.

prompts.cue_en: And: I don't want to eat now.
prompts.decompose_script: No quiero — comer — ahora.

items.teach_script: 'To go' is 'ir'. Ir. A tiny word with huge use.

teach_segments.text: A tiny word with huge use.

items.teach_script: 'To the' squeezes into one little word: 'al'. Al. So 'to the market' is — al mercado.

teach_segments.text: 'To the' squeezes into one little word:

items.teach_script: 'The market' is 'el mercado'. Mercado.
'Later' is 'luego'. Luego. Another time word — it goes at the end, like ahora.

teach_segments.text: Another time word — it goes at the end, like

prompts.cue_en: How would you say: I want to go?
To the market — I want to go to the market.
prompts.decompose_script: A plus el squeezes into al: ir al mercado.

prompts.cue_en: Just: the market.
Just: later.
I want to go now.
prompts.decompose_script: Quiero ir — then ahora at the end.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: do you want to go to the market?
prompts.decompose_script: Quieres — ir al mercado — rising at the end.

prompts.cue_en: I don't want to go now.
prompts.decompose_script: No quiero — ir ahora.

prompts.cue_en: I want to drink later.
prompts.decompose_script: Quiero beber — luego at the end.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: do you want to eat later?
prompts.decompose_script: Quieres comer luego — and let it rise.

prompts.cue_en: I don't want to go to the market.
expected: yo no quiero ir al mercado
prompts.decompose_script: No quiero, then the journey: ir al mercado.

prompts.cue_en: Again: I want to go.
Now the whole thing: I want to go to the market now.
expected: yo quiero ir al mercado ahora
prompts.decompose_script: Three pieces: quiero — ir al mercado — ahora.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: do you want to go to the market later?
expected: tú quieres ir al mercado luego
prompts.decompose_script: Quieres — ir al mercado — luego — rising at the end.

prompts.cue_en: And: I don't want to go to the market now.
expected: no quiero ir al mercado ahora
yo no quiero ir al mercado ahora
prompts.decompose_script: No quiero — ir al mercado — ahora.

items.teach_script: 'I can' is 'puedo'. Puedo. It works exactly like quiero: puedo comer — I can eat.
'I have to' is 'tengo que'. Tengo que. Tengo que comer — I have to eat.

teach_segments.text: 'tengo que'. Tengo que. Tengo que comer

items.teach_script: 'You can' is 'puedes'. Puedes. The same 'you' ending as quieres.
'Home', when you're heading there, is 'a casa'. A casa. Ir a casa — to go home.

teach_segments.text: 'a casa'. A casa. Ir a casa

prompts.cue_en: How would you say: I can?
I can go now.
prompts.decompose_script: Puedo works like quiero: puedo — ir — ahora.

prompts.cue_en: I have to eat.
Say: to go home.
I want to go home.
prompts.decompose_script: Quiero — ir a casa.

prompts.cue_en: I have to go home now.
expected: tengo que ir a casa ahora
yo tengo que ir a casa ahora
prompts.decompose_script: Tengo que — ir a casa — ahora.

prompts.cue_en: Just: you can.
I can eat later.
prompts.decompose_script: Puedo comer — luego at the end.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: can you go to the market later?
expected: tú puedes ir al mercado luego
prompts.decompose_script: Puedes — ir al mercado — luego — rising at the end.

prompts.cue_en: I can't go now.
prompts.decompose_script: No puedo — can't: no puedo ir — ahora.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: can you eat now?
prompts.decompose_script: Puedes comer ahora — let it rise.

prompts.cue_en: The big one: I can't go to the market now.
expected: no puedo ir al mercado ahora
yo no puedo ir al mercado ahora
prompts.decompose_script: No puedo, then the journey: ir al mercado — ahora.

prompts.cue_en: I have to go to the market later.
expected: tengo que ir al mercado luego
yo tengo que ir al mercado luego
prompts.decompose_script: Tengo que — ir al mercado — luego.

prompts.cue_en: And: I don't want to go home now.
expected: no quiero ir a casa ahora
yo no quiero ir a casa ahora
prompts.decompose_script: No quiero — ir a casa — ahora.

items.teach_script: 'This' is 'esto'. Esto.
'That' is 'eso'. Eso.
'Is' is 'es'. Es. Esto es bueno — this is good.
'Good' is 'bueno'. Bueno.

prompts.cue_en: How would you say: this is good?
prompts.decompose_script: Esto — es — bueno.

prompts.cue_en: That is good.
This is not good.
prompts.decompose_script: No goes before es: esto — no es — bueno.

prompts.cue_en: I want this.
I want that.
Ask me: do you want this?
I don't want that.
prompts.decompose_script: No quiero — eso.

prompts.cue_en: Just: is.
Ask me: is that good?
That is not good.
prompts.decompose_script: Eso — no es — bueno.

prompts.cue_en: From earlier: I want to eat now.
prompts.decompose_script: Quiero — comer — ahora.

prompts.cue_en: I don't want this.
prompts.decompose_script: No quiero — esto.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: is this good?
prompts.decompose_script: Esto es bueno — rising at the end.

prompts.cue_en: And: this is not good.
prompts.decompose_script: Esto — no es — bueno.

items.teach_script: 'But' is 'pero'. Pero. It glues two little sentences together.

teach_segments.text: It glues two little sentences together.

items.teach_script: 'To buy' is 'comprar'. Comprar.
Here is your whole future: 'voy a' — I'm going to. Voy a. Voy a comer — I'm going to eat. Any verb you know can follow it.

teach_segments.text: — I'm going to eat. Any verb you know can follow it.

prompts.cue_en: Just: but.
To buy.
I want to buy this.
prompts.decompose_script: Quiero comprar — esto.

prompts.cue_en: The future scaffold — say: I'm going to.
I'm going to buy that.
prompts.decompose_script: Voy a — plus any verb: voy a comprar — eso.

prompts.cue_en: I'm going to eat now.
prompts.decompose_script: Voy a comer — ahora.

prompts.cue_en: I'm going to go to the market.
expected: yo voy a ir al mercado
prompts.decompose_script: Voy a ir — al mercado. Yes, 'going to go' is normal Spanish.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: do you want to buy this?
prompts.decompose_script: Quieres comprar esto — let it rise.

prompts.cue_en: I'm not going to buy that.
expected: yo no voy a comprar eso
prompts.decompose_script: No before voy: no voy a comprar — eso.

prompts.cue_en: I have to buy this.
prompts.decompose_script: Tengo que comprar — esto.

prompts.cue_en: That is good, but I want this.
expected: eso es bueno pero quiero esto
eso es bueno pero yo quiero esto
prompts.decompose_script: Two little sentences glued with pero: eso es bueno — pero — quiero esto.

prompts.cue_en: This is good, but that is not good.
expected: esto es bueno pero eso no es bueno
prompts.decompose_script: Esto es bueno — pero — eso no es bueno.

prompts.cue_en: I want to buy this, but it's not good — say: but this is not good.
expected: quiero comprar esto pero esto no es bueno
yo quiero comprar esto pero esto no es bueno
prompts.decompose_script: Quiero comprar esto — pero — esto no es bueno.

prompts.cue_en: I'm going to go home, but I have to eat now.
expected: voy a ir a casa pero tengo que comer ahora
yo voy a ir a casa pero tengo que comer ahora
prompts.decompose_script: Voy a ir a casa — pero — tengo que comer ahora.

items.teach_script: 'You're going to' is 'vas a'. Vas a. Vas a comer — you're going to eat.

teach_segments.text: 'vas a'. Vas a. Vas a comer

items.teach_script: 'Tomorrow' is 'mañana'. Mañana. A time word — so it goes at the end.

teach_segments.text: A time word — so it goes at the end.

items.teach_script: 'Because' is 'porque'. Porque. Like pero, it glues two sentences — and now you can give reasons.

teach_segments.text: it glues two sentences — and now you can give reasons.

prompts.cue_en: You're going to — say it.
Just: tomorrow.
I'm going to go tomorrow.
prompts.decompose_script: Voy a ir — mañana at the end.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: are you going to go to the market tomorrow?
expected: vas a ir al mercado mañana
tú vas a ir al mercado mañana
prompts.decompose_script: Vas a — ir al mercado — mañana — and let it rise.

prompts.cue_en: I'm going to buy that tomorrow.
expected: yo voy a comprar eso mañana
prompts.decompose_script: Voy a comprar eso — mañana at the end.

prompts.cue_en: Just: because.
I want to go home because I have to eat.
expected: quiero ir a casa porque tengo que comer
yo quiero ir a casa porque tengo que comer
prompts.decompose_script: First clause — porque — second clause: quiero ir a casa — porque — tengo que comer.

prompts.cue_en: I can't go now because I have to eat.
expected: no puedo ir ahora porque tengo que comer
yo no puedo ir ahora porque tengo que comer
prompts.decompose_script: No puedo ir ahora — porque — tengo que comer.

prompts.cue_en: Ask me: are you going to buy this?
prompts.decompose_script: Vas a comprar esto — rising at the end.

prompts.cue_en: I'm not going to go tomorrow.
expected: yo no voy a ir mañana
prompts.decompose_script: No voy a ir — mañana.

prompts.cue_en: I'm going to eat later because I want to go now.
expected: voy a comer luego porque quiero ir ahora
yo voy a comer luego porque quiero ir ahora
prompts.decompose_script: Voy a comer luego — porque — quiero ir ahora.

prompts.cue_en: The big one: I can't go to the market now because I have to eat.
expected: no puedo ir al mercado ahora porque tengo que comer
yo no puedo ir al mercado ahora porque tengo que comer
prompts.decompose_script: Three pieces: no puedo ir al mercado ahora — porque — tengo que comer.

prompts.cue_en: I'm going to go to the market tomorrow because I have to buy this.
expected: voy a ir al mercado mañana porque tengo que comprar esto
yo voy a ir al mercado mañana porque tengo que comprar esto
prompts.decompose_script: Voy a ir al mercado mañana — porque — tengo que comprar esto.

prompts.cue_en: Last one this week: that is good, but I'm going to buy this tomorrow.
expected: eso es bueno pero voy a comprar esto mañana
eso es bueno pero yo voy a comprar esto mañana
prompts.decompose_script: Eso es bueno — pero — voy a comprar esto mañana.

victory_intro.text: Last stretch — you build these yourself.

session_close.text: That's the session. You're done for today — or keep going.
